title: Section 1 — Company Profile page
description: Build company.html. Content: founding story (1993, Charles Liang), IPO history (Mar 29 2007), core products (servers, AI/HPC, GPU, storage), technology partnerships (NVIDIA Blackwell/HGX/MGX, AMD Instinct MI350, Intel Xeon 6), manufacturing footprint (Silicon Valley campuses, 5000 air/2000 liquid racks/month), leadership (Charles Liang, Sara Liu, Kenneth Cheung), ownership breakdown, ISO 14001 cert. Include controversies section: EY resignation, Special Committee, Nasdaq filing risk. Design: hero + tabbed sub-sections.
